entries.material: ACOUSTIC LINING WALL Supply, fixing & acoustic lining on wall and ceiling of Plant rooms insulated with EPA approved Open Cell Nitrile Rubber Material with Anti- fungal and Anti-bacterial Properties of Density 180-220 Kg/cum x 20 mm thickness, Absorption coefficient value of Insulation material shall be 0.9 for the 2000 Hz frequency band in accordance to IS:8225/ISO:354/ASTM 423C.The insulation shall have fire performance such that it passes Class 1 as per BS476 Part 7 for surface spread of flame. The insulation will be supported with GI frame grid and covered with 22G and 120 GSM for perforated GI sheet
